_comment: DELIBERATELY BROKEN fixture for Sprint 4 Reviewer testing. The Reviewer must FAIL this: European Roller = a species listed in especes_incorrectes of clerac_species_reference.json (must be flagged with its recommended substitution, Dartford Warbler); Polar Bear + Bengal Tiger = unknown/off-site (must be flagged 'verify'); plus out-of-range values, a spawn_weight of 0, speed_max < speed_start, trivial badge thresholds, and a missing_assets entry. Do NOT ship this as a real level.

ui_strings.title: MISSION CLERAC
ui_strings.instructions: Collect Chamotte & Band Migratory Birds! Avoid Blasting Zones!
